available.description: The product is available for purchase. It can be added to the shopping cart, which reduces its availability by one unit.

inCart.description: The product is in the user's shopping cart. A timeout is started, and if it fires before checkout, the product is removed from the cart.

unavailable.description: The product is unavailable for immediate purchase. Users can add themselves to a waitlist.

pendingOffer.description: A user has a pending offer for the product. They can either accept it, placing it in their cart, or decline it, returning the product to available inventory.

purchased.description: The product has been purchased and is no longer available in the inventory.

waitlist.description: Users are on a waitlist for the product. When availability changes, they receive a pending offer.
